message:
test(ci): enforce PERF-3X bead ordering determinism, strengthen path validation, and clean up benchmarks

Tightens several CI and QA policy gates to enforce deterministic ordering
and fail-closed semantics, adds extension manifest capability mapping tests,
and removes dead benchmark infrastructure.

**PERF-3X bead determinism (tests/ci_full_suite_gate.rs, tests/qa_docs_policy_validation.rs):**
- Added canonical_perf3x_bead_segments() parser for numeric segment extraction
- Enhanced validate_perf3x_bead_coverage_contract() to check bead ID ordering
- New test: perf3x_bead_coverage_contract_fails_closed_on_misordered_rows
- Extracted validate_critical_perf3x_bead_entries() validator with sort/dedup checks
- New test: evidence_logging_instance_critical_perf3x_beads_fail_closed_when_unsorted

**Test path validation (tests/common/logging.rs):**
- Renamed validate_coverage_path_set() → validate_required_coverage_path_set()
  with added non-empty check
- New tests: rejects empty test_files, rejects "./" after normalization,
  rejects single "." path — all fail-closed

**Extensions manifest capability mapping (tests/extensions_manifest.rs):**
- required_capability_for_host_call_maps_events_op_aliases_to_events
- required_capability_for_host_call_maps_session_op_aliases_to_session
- required_capability_for_host_call_unsupported_event_session_ops_do_not_escalate

**Benchmark cleanup (tests/bench_scenario_runner.rs):**
- Removed unused SessionMatrixSeedRow struct and two seed matrices
- Removed unused constants: PARTITION_REALISTIC, EVIDENCE_CLASS_INFERRED,
  CONFIDENCE_MEDIUM

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

 // ─── Environment Fingerprint ────────────────────────────────────────────────
 
 fn sha256_hex(input: &str) -> String {

@@ -634,3 +634,86 @@ fn required_capability_for_host_call_maps_tool_to_capability() {
         None
     );
 }
+
+#[test]
+fn required_capability_for_host_call_maps_events_op_aliases_to_events() {
+    assert_eq!(
+        required_capability_for_host_call(&host_call(
+            "events",
+            json!({ "op": "get_active_tools" })
+        ))
+        .as_deref(),
+        Some("events")
+    );
+    assert_eq!(
+        required_capability_for_host_call(&host_call("events", json!({ "method": "set-model" })))
+            .as_deref(),
+        Some("events")
+    );
+    assert_eq!(
+        required_capability_for_host_call(&host_call(
+            "events",
+            json!({ "name": "register command" })
+        ))
+        .as_deref(),
+        Some("events")
+    );
+    assert_eq!(
+        required_capability_for_host_call(&host_call(" EVENTS ", json!({ "op": " list_flags " })))
+            .as_deref(),
+        Some("events")
+    );
+    assert_eq!(
+        required_capability_for_host_call(&host_call("events", json!({ "op": "append.entry" })))
+            .as_deref(),
+        Some("events")
+    );
+}
+
+#[test]
+fn required_capability_for_host_call_maps_session_op_aliases_to_session() {
+    assert_eq!(
+        required_capability_for_host_call(&host_call("session", json!({ "op": "get_model" })))
+            .as_deref(),
+        Some("session")
+    );
+    assert_eq!(
+        required_capability_for_host_call(&host_call(
+            "session",
+            json!({ "method": "set-thinking_level" })
+        ))
+        .as_deref(),
+        Some("session")
+    );
+    assert_eq!(
+        required_capability_for_host_call(&host_call("session", json!({ "name": "set label" })))
+            .as_deref(),
+        Some("session")
+    );
+    assert_eq!(
+        required_capability_for_host_call(&host_call(" SESSION ", json!({ "op": " get-file " })))
+            .as_deref(),
+        Some("session")
+    );
+}
+
+#[test]
+fn required_capability_for_host_call_unsupported_event_session_ops_do_not_escalate() {
+    // Unsupported op values should never escalate out of the declared method capability class.
+    assert_eq!(
+        required_capability_for_host_call(&host_call("events", json!({ "op": "launch_shell" })))
+            .as_deref(),
+        Some("events")
+    );
+    assert_eq!(
+        required_capability_for_host_call(&host_call("session", json!({ "op": "exec" })))
+            .as_deref(),
+        Some("session")
+    );
+
+    // Unknown method still fails closed.
+    assert_eq!(
+        required_capability_for_host_call(&host_call("mystery", json!({ "op": "exec" }))),
+        None
+    );
+}
